info.title: LeSGo API
info.description: Logistics & multi-service API for LeSGo — ride, delivery, buy, and eat services.

post.summary: Create an address for a user
Register or update FCM push token

get.summary: Get total completed distance across all orders

patch.summary: Update driver GPS location (driver updates own location)

get.summary: List notifications for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a branch for a partner
Receive payment webhook from provider (Xendit, GCash, Maya)
Create a Xendit hosted invoice (GCash, Maya, cards, OTC, VA)

get.summary: Get receipt for a completed order
Get wallet balance for a user
Get wallet transactions for a user

body.example: Your order has been accepted by a driver.
